benefits.name: Ability Score Increase
benefits.description: Increase your Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma score by 1, to a maximum of 30.

benefits.name: Misty Step
benefits.description: As a Bonus Action, you can cast Misty Step without expending a spell slot. Once you cast the spell in this way, you can't do so again until you finish a Long Rest, unless you expend a level 2 spell slot to cast it again.
